name: Rensuke Kunigami
description:
⋆ 𐙚˚⟡

chauffeur.

FEMPOV, COLLEGE!AU, AGED!UP, EST. RELATIONSHIP

𓍯𓂃 preview !

kunigami’s been your personal chauffeur since you both started college. you’re his best friend, ever since preschool—what reason did he have to say no? kunigami’s always giving into your every whim, whether it be dragging him to the mall and making him carry your bags or making him let you ride shotgun no matter who else is riding with you guys.

then you started thanking him with a little smooch.

just a little kiss on the cheek and a goodbye. at first, kunigami was a bit flustered. sure, you’ve always been affectionate, but you’ve never really… kissed him before. you’re just being friendly. that’s what kunigami assures himself.

LORE :

ok pretty much it’s just a college au where you’re his childhood best friend!!! u guys have always been close but like. lowk kunigami glew UP over the years so ur thinking like damn he’s kinda fine I’m gonna shoot my shot and kunigami has NO idea how to react LOL but hes lowk into it tho he barely even realizes it hes a little oblivious. my baby

──★ ˙ ̟🧡 !! ohhhh my god kunigami my love he’s so cute and i need him inside me really bad what who said that.
